claim: Changes to domains/*/graph.json shall be made only through `hotam apply-proposal` / `hotam land`, with direct hand-edits prohibited outside of bootstrap events.
evidence: cd D:/ai_dev/prat/HotamSpec && go test ./internal/loader/... -run TestNoHandEditGraph_RealDomainLocksPinCurrentGraph -v : PASS (task #226 recursion, 2026-07-16); Apply (internal/proposal/apply.go) is the sanctioned write path (load -> mutate -> WriteGraph -> WriteLock); TestNoHandEditGraph_RealDomainLocksPinCurrentGraph mechanically verifies every real domain's graph.lock sha256 pin matches its current graph.json, catching any hand-edit that bypassed Apply
